titleStmt.title: SII 27.56: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 56. (A.R. No. 460 of 1928-29.) KUḌUPU, MANGALORE TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: On two pieces of a broken slab set up in the outer prākāra of Anantapadmanābhasvāmin temple.
This record is dated Śaka 1297, Rākshasa, Kārttika śu. 1, Thursday, corresponding to 1375 A.D., October 25, Thursday, f.d.t. ·35.

The inscription records that when Paṇḍaridēva was governing Maṅgaḷūru-rājya, the king endowed the two villages Kuḍupu and Mālūru, with rights of ownership (oḍetana) and exemption of the taxes saṭṭu and beḍige to Vidyāraṇya-śrīpāda of Śriṅgēri, in turn, set apart the income, in cash and in kind, from these two villages for worship and offerings in the temples of Śaṅkara and Rāmanāthadēva and for the feeding of twelve brāhmaṇas in the temple at Kuḍupu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē trailōkya naga
rāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrī śakavaruṣa 1297 neya rā
kṣasa saṁvatsarada kārttika su 1 gu śrīmanu mahārājādhirāja rājaparamē
svara śrīvīra bukkarāya rājyābhyudaya rāyana nirūpadiṁda paṁḍa
ridēvaṁgaḷu maṁgalūra rājyavanāḷuva kāladali rāyanu siṁgē
riya vidyāraṁṇya śrī pādaṁgaḷige samarppisida dharmada kramaveṁta
ṁdatā kuḍupina dēvālyadalu yatigaḷu brāhmaṇarige pratidinajana 12 ka
ṁ brāhmaṇa bhōjana naḍavaṁtāgi naṁdaḷikeya nāḍoḷagaṇa kuḍupina grāma 1 kaṁ
maṁgalūra kāṭi ga 240 koṁba bhatta mū 60 mālūra haravari 1 kaṁ bhattamū
ḍe 360 vubhayaṁ kā ga 240 bhatta mūḍe 420 kaṁ catrakke vale 1 kaṁ
bhattamūḍe 360 mēlu veccakke kāga 90 kuḍupina dēvarige yiruḷina
nivēdyakke mālūra haravariyaṁda bhattamūḍe 60 kuḍi Aki hā
ne 32nu naḍavudu naḍasi śaṁkaradēvara Amṛtapaḍi maṁga
lūra kāga 150 Aṁttu kāga 240 bhattamūḍe 420 varuṣaṁpratiya
lu naḍavudu yistānavanū dharmavanū śrīpādaṁgaḷa nirūpadiṁdali
śaṁkara rāmanātha dēvarige dhārāpūrvvakavāgi naḍavaṁtāgi ko
ṭṭaru yi vūra voḍetanamuṁ śrīpādaṁgaḷigalade Arasina voḍetana
salladu kuḍupu mālūralu kaḍida kaṁdāyadalu saṭṭu beḍige salla
du yivūroḷage Āru vobbaru māḍidaḍe Aḍikeyata
ppu māḍidaḍe śrīpādaṁgaḷu koṁbaru yidharmmakke Ārobbaru va
kravamāḍidaḍe Arasiṁge tappu kāga 2000 hoṁna teṟuAḍaku
Arasu yidharmmakke vakravamāḍidaḍe vāraṇāsiyalu sāvira kavile
yanū sāvira brāṁhaṇaranū koṁda dōṣake hōharu yidha
rmavanū pālisidavaru vāruṇāsiyalu sahasra kavileya
nū dānavamāḍi sāvira brāṁhmaṇaranū rakṣisida puṁṇya
kke hōharu yidharmmavu Ā caṁdrārkkastāīyāgi naḍavaṁtā
nāṁḍu grāmanakhara haṁjamāna Ācaramuṁtāgi śilāsā
sanamaṁ barasikoṭṭu yidharmmava māḍida paṁḍaridēvaṁgaḷi
ge maṁgaḷaṁ mahāśrī svadattān paradattāṁ vā yō harē
ti vasuṁdharā śaṣṭivvaruṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāya
tē krimi . śubhamastu .
Digital edition of SII 27.56 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
